name: Pastel Popcorn Balls
recipeInstructions: DIRECTIONS: Heat 1/4 cup vegetable oil in a 4 quart kettle for 3 minutes. Add popcorn. Cover loosely. Shake frequently over medium heat until popping stops. Mix corn syrup, sugar, and salt. Tint with red or green food coloring. Flavor with green using wintergreen and red using peppermint. Add to corn, and stir over medium heat for 3 to 5 minutes or until corn is completely coated. Butter hands and shape mixture into balls about 1 1/2 inches diameter. Wrap in saran wrap.
